microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **enterprise resilience** validation program from a 2-person operation into a platformized solution, standardizing solution design workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills across customers like Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Served as **technical voice** in 14 high-visibility cross-org recovery executions — including bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract — translating complex architectures for executive audiences.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21%, directly demonstrating the business ROI of AI-native tooling to engineering and leadership stakeholders.

Shaped **roadmap priorities** by conducting 11+ consultative discovery interviews with Azure engineering teams, surfacing critical integration gaps that led to intent-based YAML generation being added as a core feature.

Accelerated enterprise data retrieval by **83%** by implementing semantic search infrastructure and rigorous metadata standards, migrating documentation to an AI-powered platform and building technical enablement materials for ongoing adoption.

Led consultative discovery with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, translating findings into a strategic automation roadmap that eliminated critical bottlenecks across the integration lifecycle.
Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership a repeatable framework to target automation gaps and prioritize high-ROI infrastructure investments.
amazon_robotics: Architected a **zero-downtime** legacy OS migration strategy for a 2,000+ unit pilot by mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, designing a phased implementation plan that protected enterprise operational continuity.

Partnered with IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a reusable integration framework for future rollouts.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and discovery ceremonies, prioritizing a backlog of **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain velocity during a complex platform transition.
pro_painters: Boosted job bookings by **26%** by architecting a new CRM-based solution design process, managing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals and improving sales-to-close conversion rates.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing web presence and search profiles to map product capabilities directly to customer pain points.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial ROI analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks to deliver a data-driven framework for profitability decisions.
